projects.name: bq-finops-optimizer
projects.title: BQ FinOps Optimizer
projects.description: ⚡ The ultimate BigQuery FinOps suite. Optimize storage billing, right-size Editions capacity via statistical simulations, accurately attribute reservation costs, and eliminate SQL anti-patterns.

projects.name: RouteMind
projects.title: RouteMind
projects.description: A robust routing architecture built on the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK 2.0) and deployed to Vertex AI Reasoning Engine (Agent Engine). It uses a lightweight Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite classifier to dynamically route user queries to the optimal Claude specialist tier (Haiku 4.5, Sonnet 4.6, Opus 4.8, or Fable 5).

projects.name: wealth-dashboard
projects.title: Wealth Dashboard
projects.description: A sophisticated financial tracking dashboard built with Google Sheets and Apps Script to visualize net worth, asset allocation, and progress toward financial independence (FIRE).

projects.name: ChatScribe
projects.title: ChatScribe
projects.description: ChatScribe is an enterprise-grade conversation ingestion and semantic structuring engine that normalizes chat history, scrubs PII, and indexes threaded transcripts into PostgreSQL/pgvector for downstream RAG pipelines.

projects.name: ask-a-friend
projects.title: Ask A Friend
projects.description: Ask a Friend is a secure autonomous agent plugin and local CLI that lets coding agents consult specialized AI models when stuck. Built with native client-side PII scrubbing, SHA-256 prompt caching, and rolling SQLite cost guardrails to keep developer workflows secure, lightning-fast, and highly cost-effective.

projects.name: machine-learning-cert
projects.title: Machine Learning Cert
projects.description: 🎓 Elite multi-modal study hub for GCP Professional ML Engineer & Generative AI Leader certifications. Rich guides, slides, and AI-generated podcasts (NotebookLM) covering advanced ML & GenAI.

projects.name: PocketRAG
projects.title: PocketRAG
projects.description: PocketRAG is a zero-infrastructure, portable agent plugin (Skill + FastMCP Server) that turns NotebookLM Enterprise (via Vertex AI Discovery Engine) into an instant, managed RAG backend for any LLM client (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Gemini, Cline). Bring your own documents to your AI assistant in under 60 seconds.

projects.name: ListingVault
projects.title: ListingVault
projects.description: Private real estate video intelligence platform. Syncs YouTube walkthrough feeds recursively using optimized 1-quota API strategies, extracts layout metadata privately via Gemini 3.5 Flash, and enables zero-latency hybrid semantic RAG search using gemini-embedding-2 and pgvector. Designed for modern, dark matte aesthetics.

projects.name: PersonaAdGen
projects.title: PersonaAdGen
projects.description: AI-powered advertising content generator that transforms user photos into compelling, persona-driven advertising scenes. The agent guides users through a story-driven brief collection process, automatically generates headlines, and creates multiple advertising scenes tailored to specific target audiences.

projects.name: audioscribe
projects.title: Audioscribe
projects.description: Hybrid Speech-to-Text & Semantic Diarization Ingestion Engine. Powered by GCP STT v2 & Gemini 3.5 Flash.

projects.name: eml2pdf
projects.title: Eml2pdf
projects.description: eml2pdf is a premium, production-ready Python library and command-line utility designed to convert .eml email archive files into high-fidelity PDF documents.

projects.name: WhisperOnGCP
projects.title: WhisperOnGCP
projects.description: Air-gapped security, OpenAI Whisper + pyannote diarization, FFmpeg preprocessing, serverless GCP Cloud Run GPU deployment, and scale-to-zero billing optimization.

projects.name: omnidoc
projects.title: Omnidoc
projects.description: Omnidoc transforms any ZIP archive into a single, structured, LLM-ready document — no matter what file types are inside.

projects.name: SpatialSense
projects.title: SpatialSense
projects.description: SpatialSense is an autonomous geospatial reasoning engine orchestrating Gemini 3.1 Pro and BigQuery GIS for high-fidelity urban analytics. It translates unstructured natural language intent into optimized Spatial SQL, executing across massive datasets in milliseconds. Results are perceived through an immersive, photorealistic 3D environment powered

projects.name: PixelMind
projects.title: PixelMind
projects.description: PixelMind is an autonomous, perceptual AI testing framework that uses high-capacity multimodal models and spatial awareness to interact with web interfaces visually, effectively eliminating the fragility of traditional DOM-bound automation
